title: 断航故土

format.visual_style: grounded cinematic eastern epic fantasy with restrained magic

global_principles: Preserve continuity over isolated image beauty.
Use grounded materials, worn surfaces, controlled lighting, and visible story props.
Keep magic effects short, residual, and tied to old infrastructure or bloodline reaction.
Show large events through close-ups, sound cues, shadows, partial silhouettes, smoke, snow, and aftermath.
global_negative_rules: no full heroic armor for Shen Weisang in season 01
no modern weapons or modern tactical gear
no clean fantasy palace beauty for ruined Zhaoming relics
no full monster-only bodies for Sumin upper intellectual officials like Bai Yi
no human officer body for Sumin lower-force combat caste like Li Tang or shell soldiers
no human hair or real human face for Bai Yi, even in ruler disguise
no visible old-imperial insignia on Yan Nanzhi's exile clothing
no subtle-only animal jewelry for northern half-beasts; clear beast ears are required
no ragged beggar clothing for core human characters or identifiable civilians
no large-scale battlefield crowd unless specifically required by later director-room outputs

regional_scene_systems.name: 人族生活中心
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Short work clothes, tied sleeves, aprons, tool loops, practical patches and maintained shoes; show poverty through use and repair, not beggar rags.

regional_scene_systems.name: 人族统治中心
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Formal clothing may be ornate, but it must carry preservation marks, humid-climate adaptation, cracks and historical debt rather than pristine court glamour.

regional_scene_systems.name: 战场与征粮线
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Armor plates, leggings, guards, blood, mud and repairs must preserve military or labor identity; avoid anonymous corpse fields and game armor.

regional_scene_systems.name: 金河大河与航运线
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Boat workers and fugitives add oil-cloth capes, tied sleeves, wet shoes, waist ropes and hidden waterproof packets without losing their base identity anchors.

regional_scene_systems.name: 河边蒸汽小镇
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Residents combine lived-in town clothing with work aprons, oil cloth and tool hang points; Sumin control appears through wax-white seals and cold-gray registers over the warmer life palette.

regional_scene_systems.name: 平原丘陵麦浪农村
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Farmers use intact workwear, tied cuffs, repaired shoes and maintained tools; this is livable homeland under pressure, not a saturated pastoral postcard.

regional_scene_systems.name: 绝境山脉
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Characters add wind capes, gloves, leggings and rope buckles; border soldiers, fugitives and northern people must remain distinct silhouettes.

regional_scene_systems.name: 北国荒原与草原秃山
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Northern half-beast clothing can be noble and heavy, but must show travel, wind and cold-use logic; northern lands are not only white snow.

regional_scene_systems.name: 虫族统治中心
regional_scene_systems.costume_logic: Upper ruler-form insects use white bureaucratic robes with visible chitin, compound eyes and wing mantles; lower force guards remain non-humanoid black-green carapace bodies.

costume_scene_modeling_rules: A character entering a new region may add environmental layers but must not lose face, garment, prop or faction anchors.
Human life clothing, human formal rule clothing, battlefield clothing, river workwear, northern noble half-beast clothing and Sumin official clothing must use different silhouettes.

Highlight colors are bound to meaning: vermilion and gold-red for Zhaoming relics and fire, moon-white for oath and jade, Qingming white for Sumin institutions, river blue-green for navigation, wheat gold for livable countryside.

gold_red.usage: Zhaoming old imperial banner accents, Shen Weisang spirit-wing residual marks, old relay light routes, firelight reflections

zhaoming_vermilion.usage: Zhaoming flag ground and old imperial cloth fragments

moon_white.usage: Yan Nanzhi jade, treaty platform, broken star charts

exile_purple_gray.usage: Yan Nanzhi concealed exile robe, smoke-purple and cold-gray travel state

imperial_formal_bright.usage: Yan Nanzhi and southern old-imperial formal wardrobe, vivid vermilion, peacock blue and woven gold

qingming_white.usage: Bai Yi, Qingming Court, registers, insect wax, cleansing authority

faction_systems.name: 昭明旧帝国遗产
shape_language: golden sun wheel containing moon-white crescent
faction_systems.flag_design: Warm human imperial banner: dark vermilion long cloth, worn golden sun wheel with a moon-white crescent placed inside the sun wheel as one fused Sun-Moon emblem, old gold woven border, frayed and smoke-damaged. Never draw the sun and moon as separate side-by-side symbols.
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Relics must look damaged, covered, partial, or rediscovered; never pristine imperial glory in season 01. City gates, relay stations, border steles, military hardware, shipyards, star-chart platforms, and border-wall array bases may carry the old fused Sun-Moon double seal.

faction_systems.name: 肃明国与清明院
shape_language: black sun with cold pale halo pressed under abstract white wings
faction_systems.flag_design: Cold bureaucratic banner: wax-white vertical flag, black sun disk with a cold white or dark-gray halo, visibly covered or pressed down by abstract white wings. The wings should feel like geometric order bands, folded white wing-bones, or ritualized clean coverage, not literal insect specimen wings. The old moon mark is intentionally scraped away, painted over, or left as a blank scar. The meaning is insect order covering the old human Sun-Moon flag, not a neutral black-sun emblem.
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Upper Qingming authority stays clean, cold, white, vertical, and bureaucratic; insect traits are controlled and partial. Lower Armor Army force must be clearly non-humanoid insect combat bodies with black-green hardened carapace, reverse-jointed legs, blade arms, mandible guards, short spears and old iron command harnesses. Sumin marks must show coverage, erasure, and replacement of the old fused Sun-Moon order.

faction_systems.name: 边墙与灰墙军
symbols: 祖传旧甲磨损日月压痕
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Border people must look exhausted, repaired, and practical, not like clean imperial soldiers. Xue Linqiang's old Sun-Moon mark belongs on ancestral armor as a nearly erased physical imprint, not on an obvious cloth strip.

faction_systems.name: 墙下混裔
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Mixed heritage traits should be subtle and lived-in, not decorative spectacle.

faction_systems.name: 北境寻灾源派
faction_systems.continuity_rule: Only partial presence in season 01, but northern half-beasts must be real modelable people: human-form bodies with clear beast ears or localized beast traits, role-specific clothing and northern social rank. Lu Mi is a beautiful noble half-beast with visible deer ears and luxurious rare fur; do not reduce her to subtle jewelry.

state_continuity.shen_weisang_after_ep02: charred hem must remain visible or implied in every outfit state
state_continuity.shen_weisang_identity: must read as a 17-year-old boy with youthful sword-like eyebrows and clear guarded eyes, not a mature war hero
state_continuity.yan_nanzhi_all_season: female exiled royal princess with multiple wardrobe states: exile robe is mist-purple/cold-gray, clean and controlled with no visible old-imperial insignia; old imperial formal state uses vivid Ming-style Hanfu reference with vermilion, peacock blue, moon white and woven gold; jade and treaty props are hidden during exile
state_continuity.shen_zhaomian_after_capture: Qingming white clothing plus a remaining childhood anchor such as burned hair cord or herb pouch
state_continuity.human_poverty_clothing: poor and fleeing human characters may show dust, smoke, patches, scorched edges and repairs, but collars, cuffs, belts, shoes, armor plates and prop hang points must stay structurally readable; avoid beggar rags and identical generic refugee outfits
state_continuity.bai_yi_all_scenes: upper intellectual ruler-form insectoid authority: spotless white robe, cylindrical Qingming crown or integrated head casing, wing-membrane shoulder layer, chitin faceplate, compound eyes, insect-wax needle or Qingming register anchor; no human hair or real human face, only ruler disguise
state_continuity.xue_linqiang_armor: old Sun-Moon mark appears only as a severely worn imprint on ancestral armor breastplate or inner shoulder plate; do not use obvious waist cloth insignia
state_continuity.lu_mi_all_scenes: beautiful northern noble half-beast with clear deer ears, luxurious rare fur, ice-blue noble layers, bone-gold clasps and aurora-green accents; not subtle human-only design
state_continuity.gu_huaizhang_all_scenes: southern old-imperial elegance after 1200 years in humid heat: light silk-hemp, breathable gauze, vermilion, peacock blue, vine green, ivory and oxidized old gold; ornate but climate-adapted
state_continuity.northern_half_beast_system: northern beastfolk and half-beasts use human-form bodies with clear beast ears/tails/crests or localized beast traits, social-rank-specific fur and ornaments, never full animals or ordinary humans with tiny accessories
state_continuity.li_tang_all_scenes: lower-force non-humanoid mantis combat caste: 2.4-2.7m, black-green hardened carapace, reverse-jointed legs, blade arms, mandible guard, narrow compound eyes, old iron command harness and iron gate order token
state_continuity.suming_shell_soldiers: lower-rank non-humanoid insect infantry appear in small filmable groups of two to five; black-green or dark-brown shells, bone-white wax bands, short spears or hooks, forearm blades and no human helmeted-soldier reading
state_continuity.magic_effects: spirit-wing residual marks are short gold-red lines at eye corner, shoulder blade, wrist, or old relay ground route
